d: Dionel soars into the air and becomes untargetable for [[6]]s, during which he attacks the area with the most enemies using spear thrust, dealing [[170%]]<ATK> damage to all adjacent enemies. The last hit of spear thrust knocks the enemy into the air, and its damage dealt is increased to [[250%]]<ATK>.
Gains a Nectar Feast buff within the effect duration. Using this skill won't shorten its duration until the skill ends if Dionel has already been buffed.
Increases the damage of sword shock to [[180%]]<ATK> and the damage of its last hit to [[260%]]<ATK>.
The skill duration is extended by [[2]]s if Dionel achieves an [[assist or defeat]] on an enemy hero, triggered only once per casting.
Increases the damage of sword shock to [[190%]]<ATK> and the damage of its last hit to [[270%]]<ATK>.
Passive. Dionel's normal attack turns into a Penetration attack, dealing [[145%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies along the way.
Increases the Penetration attack damage to [[150%]]<ATK>.
Flashes to a better attacking position if not in a good spot, triggered once every [[6]]s.
Increases the Penetration attack damage to [[155%]]<ATK>.

Passive. Dionel gains a stack of Intoxication when receiving the non-permanent stats boost from an ally, increasing [[15%]] ATK and [[15]] ATK SPD up to [[3]] stacks, triggered once only by each ally.
Active. Dionel drinks the divine nectar to increase [[20%]] ATK and [[20]] ATK SPD for [[12]]s.
For each Intoxication stack, the ATK bonus is increased to [[16%]], and the ATK SPD bonus is increased to [[16]].
For each Intoxication stack, the ATK bonus is increased to [[18%]], and the ATK SPD bonus is increased to [[18]].
The bonuses from active casting are increased to [[25%]] ATK and [[25]] ATK SPD.
Dionel's normal attack permanently increases his ATK SPD by [[3]] during battle, for a maximum ATK SPD bonus of [[30]].
Dionel's normal attack permanently increases his ATK SPD by [[4]] during battle, for a maximum ATK SPD bonus of [[40]].
Dionel's normal attack permanently increases his ATK SPD by [[5]] during battle, for a maximum ATK SPD bonus of [[50]].

Dionel summons a light spear after a short delay, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> true damage to all enemies, up to 3 casting per battle. The skill is only available when the owned Intoxication is fully stacked.
Increases the skill damage dealt to [[210%]]<ATK>.

Deals extra true damage equal to [[20%]] of the target's current HP when first casting the skill in a battle. Reduces target's Vitality by [[60]] in the next [[8]]s. The extra damage is no more than [[1000%]] of ATK.
Increases the skill damage dealt to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Dionel increases Execution by [[20]] within the duration of Nectar Feast if it's been activated.

When Dionel casts Nectar Feast, he drinks the divine nectar [[50%]] faster. While the divine nectar effect is active, he gains a shield that absorbs [[60%]]<HP> damage. When he reaches max Intoxication stacks, his Execution increases by [[25]] further.
